center.title: Track Your Carbon.
center.sub: The smartest way to measure, reduce, and offset your environmental impact.

right.label: What is Carbon Footprint?
right.desc: Every action has a carbon cost — from the food you eat to how you travel. Your footprint measures the total greenhouse gases your lifestyle produces in CO₂ equivalent.
right.fact: The average person emits 4–10 tons of CO₂ per year.

left.label: Why It Matters?
left.desc: Rising CO₂ levels drive climate change, extreme weather, and biodiversity loss. Understanding your footprint is the first step toward meaningful, measurable change.
left.fact: 1.5°C warming could displace 143 million people by 2050.

up.label: How Our App Helps
up.desc: Log daily activities, visualise your trends, join community challenges, and unlock AI coaching — designed to help you live lighter on the planet.
up.fact: Users who track daily cut emissions by 23% on average.

down.label: Start Your Journey
down.desc: Join thousands of eco-conscious users already making a difference. Track, reduce, and earn Eco Coins you can swap, donate, or redeem for green rewards.
down.fact: Every tonne of CO₂ avoided = 100 Eco Coins earned.

popup.globe: Drag the globe to explore sections

sidebar.impactText: Every small action counts towards a greener future.

tagline.dead: Start logging to grow your forest
tagline.forest: Your forest is alive and thriving! 🌳
